entries.name: AC Penalty
entries.summary: Reduces Armour Class because the character is easier to hit, damage, or target.

entries.name: Accountability
entries.summary: Binds the character to oversight, rules, reporting duties, or consequences from an authority.

entries.name: Bane
entries.summary: Makes a defined substance, condition, or situation harmful to the character.

entries.name: Blind Fury
entries.summary: Causes the character to lose control under a chosen trigger and act rashly or violently.

entries.name: Cursed
entries.summary: Afflicts the character with a supernatural or narrative curse that regularly complicates play.

entries.name: Degraded
entries.summary: Represents a reduced Ability Score caused by a defined source rather than normal aptitude.

entries.name: Diminished Proficiency
entries.summary: Reduces the character's Proficiency Bonus and has broad balance impact.

entries.name: Easily Distracted
entries.summary: Draws the character's attention away when a chosen trigger appears.

entries.name: Fragile
entries.summary: Lowers the character's maximum Hit Points.

entries.name: Hounded
entries.summary: Makes the character widely recognized, watched, followed, or unable to keep a private life.

entries.name: Impaired Manipulation
entries.summary: Limits or removes the character's ability to manipulate objects with hands or appendages.

entries.name: Impaired Speech
entries.summary: Limits or removes the character's ability to communicate verbally.

entries.name: Inept Attack
entries.summary: Applies a penalty to the character's attack rolls.

entries.name: Ism
entries.summary: Represents discrimination or social hostility tied to a defined aspect of the character.

entries.name: Limited Damage
entries.summary: Reduces damage under a defined condition or attack category.

entries.name: Magnet
entries.summary: Attracts unwanted events, attention, mishaps, or complications of a chosen kind.

entries.name: Marked
entries.summary: Makes the character visibly identifiable by a distinctive, hard-to-hide trait.

entries.name: Nemesis
entries.summary: Gives the character an enemy who regularly interferes with their goals.

entries.name: Nightmares
entries.summary: Burdened sleep or visions regularly interfere with the character's recovery or focus.

entries.name: Obligated
entries.summary: Requires the character to meet ongoing duties, service, debt, or loyalty demands.

entries.name: Obstacle
entries.summary: Creates a recurring hindrance that complicates a specific kind of action or situation.

entries.name: Opposing Advantage
entries.summary: Gives opponents an advantage against the character under defined circumstances.

entries.name: Phobia
entries.summary: Makes a defined fear disrupt the character when the subject is present or relevant.

entries.name: Physical Impairment
entries.summary: Represents a significant physical limitation with practical adventuring effects.

entries.name: Reduced Damage
entries.summary: Applies a broad reduction to the damage the character inflicts.

entries.name: Secret
entries.summary: The character hides information that would cause trouble if revealed.

entries.name: Sensory Impairment
entries.summary: Limits or removes one or more ordinary senses.

entries.name: Significant Other
entries.summary: Gives the character an important person whose safety or needs can complicate adventures.

entries.name: Slow
entries.summary: Reduces the character's movement speed.

entries.name: Social Fault
entries.summary: Adds a social habit, reputation, attitude, or behavior that regularly creates friction.

entries.name: Special Requirement
entries.summary: Requires the character to meet a specific condition to function normally.

entries.name: Susceptible
entries.summary: Makes the character take extra damage from a defined attack or source.

entries.name: Unique Defect
entries.summary: Covers a custom drawback whose point value and effects are set with DM approval.

entries.name: Vulnerability
entries.summary: Makes a selected attack form, substance, or situation especially dangerous to the character.

entries.name: Wanted
entries.summary: Places a bounty, legal pursuit, or active search on the character.

entries.name: Weak Point
entries.summary: Defines a vulnerable spot or condition that can be exploited.
